title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The green waters of Maelstrom Bay stretch out in all directions.  Low, gentle swells roll in rhythmically from the great western sea.  To the east, the mainland is marked by a sheer, rocky cliff.  Sea birds soar high overhead, scanning the waters for signs of fish.
paths: Obvious paths: north, northeast, east, southeast, south, southwest, west, northwest, down

wayto.11439: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'south' else move 'swim south' end; waitrt?
